TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andre_Barrett, title = Andre_Barrett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andre_Barrett} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Andre Barrett, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andre Barrett mqwas biru sa Rice pqwsan biru seneng, New York City, New York. Andre Barrett, t'aring kawas tay 2000 tehuk kawas tay 2004, mqwas biru sa Seton Hall pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Andre Barrett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2004, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)

kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Andre Barrett, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andre Barrett mqwas biru sa Rice pqwsan biru seneng, New York City, New York. Andre Barrett, t'aring kawas tay 2000 tehuk kawas tay 2004, mqwas biru sa Seton Hall pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Andre Barrett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2004, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*re βarrett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja an*re βarrett mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa riʦ~ʨe pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, new jork ʦ~ʨitj, new jork. an*re βarrett, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕeton ħall pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja an*re βarrett s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ)
